title: pellaea aspera
intro: Pellaea aspera, also known as Rough Buckhorn Fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. Pellaea aspera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
